history.en: Modern designer crossbreed first intentionally developed in Australia in the 1990s by crossing Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with Poodle, aiming to create a friendly family companion with low-shedding coat suitable for allergy sufferers
history.zh: 现代设计师杂交犬，于20世纪90年代在澳大利亚首次有意培育，通过将卡瓦利尔国王查理士猎犬与贵宾犬杂交，旨在创造一种对过敏患者友好的低脱毛被毛的友好家庭伴侣犬。

overview.en: The Cavapoo is a delightful designer crossbreed, combining the affectionate and gentle nature of the Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with the intelligence and low-shedding coat of the Poodle. Bred in Australia during the 1990s, this mixed breed has quickly become a beloved family companion worldwide. Cavapoos are known for their friendly, outgoing, and playful temperament. They are highly affectionate and thrive on human companionship, often forming strong bonds with their owners. Their intelligence makes them quick learners, but they can sometimes be a bit sensitive. Typically weighing between 9 and 25 pounds and standing 9 to 14 inches tall, they come in a variety of colors. With a life expectancy of 12 to 15 years, they are generally healthy, though they may inherit conditions common to both parent breeds. Overall, the Cavapoo is a gentle, adaptable, and charming dog that fits well into many lifestyles, especially for those seeking a loving and relatively low-shedding pet.
overview.zh: 卡瓦普犬是一种令人愉悦的设计师混种犬，结合了骑士查理王小猎犬的深情温和性格与贵宾犬的聪明和低掉毛被毛。这种混种犬于20世纪90年代在澳大利亚首次培育，并迅速成为全球备受喜爱的家庭伴侣。卡瓦普犬以其友好、外向和顽皮的气质而闻名。它们非常深情，渴望人类陪伴，通常与主人建立牢固的情感纽带。它们的聪明使它们学习迅速，但有时也会有些敏感。体重通常在9到25磅之间，身高9到14英寸，毛色多样。预期寿命为12到15年，总体健康，但可能遗传亲本犬种的常见疾病。总的来说，卡瓦普犬是一种温和、适应性强且有魅力的犬种，适合多种生活方式，特别是那些寻求有爱且相对低掉毛宠物的人。

care.en: Daily care for a Cavapoo requires consistent grooming, exercise, and veterinary attention. Their coat, which can range from wavy to curly, needs brushing at least 3-4 times per week to prevent matting. Professional grooming every 4-6 weeks is recommended to keep the coat tidy and reduce shedding. Cavapoos have moderate energy levels and need about 30-60 minutes of exercise daily, such as walks, playtime, or trips to a dog park. They enjoy interactive games and mental stimulation. Regular vet check-ups are crucial, as Cavapoos can be prone to ear infections (due to floppy ears), dental issues, hip dysplasia, and heart conditions like mitral valve disease. Clean their ears weekly, brush their teeth daily, and keep up with vaccinations and parasite prevention. Nail trimming every few weeks is also necessary. With proper care, your Cavapoo will stay healthy, happy, and well-groomed.
care.zh: 卡瓦普犬的日常护理需要一致的梳理、运动以及兽医关注。它们的被毛从波浪状到卷曲不等，每周至少需要刷毛3到4次以防止打结。建议每4到6周进行一次专业美容，以保持被毛整洁并减少掉毛。卡瓦普犬精力中等，每天需要30到60分钟的运动，例如散步、玩耍或去狗公园。它们喜欢互动游戏和脑力刺激。定期的兽医检查至关重要，因为卡瓦普犬易患耳部感染（由于垂耳）、牙齿问题、髋关节发育不良以及心脏疾病（如二尖瓣疾病）。每周清洁耳朵，每天刷牙，并按时接种疫苗和进行寄生虫预防。每隔几周修剪指甲也是必要的。通过适当的护理，您的卡瓦普犬将保持健康、快乐且整洁。

training.en: Training a Cavapoo is generally a rewarding experience due to their intelligence and eagerness to please. They respond best to positive reinforcement methods, such as treats, praise, and play. Harsh corrections can cause them to become timid or anxious. Start training early, focusing on basic commands like sit, stay, come, and leash manners. Cavapoos can be sensitive, so keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun. Socialization is critical—expose them to various people, animals, and environments from a young age to prevent shyness or fearfulness. They can sometimes be stubborn, especially if the Poodle side dominates, but consistency and patience will yield results. Crate training is often successful and provides them with a safe space. Housebreaking is usually straightforward with a regular schedule. Advanced training like agility or tricks can be great for mental stimulation. Overall, a Cavapoo thrives on gentle, consistent guidance and will become a well-mannered companion.
training.zh: 训练卡瓦普犬通常是一种令人愉悦的体验，因为它们聪明且渴望取悦主人。它们对正面强化方法反应最佳，如零食、赞美和玩耍。严厉的纠正可能使它们变得胆怯或焦虑。尽早开始训练，重点放在基本指令上，如坐下、等待、过来和牵绳礼仪。卡瓦普犬可能比较敏感，因此训练时间应保持短暂（5到10分钟）且有趣。社会化至关重要——从小让它们接触不同的人、动物和环境，以防止害羞或恐惧。它们有时会固执，特别是如果贵宾犬的基因占主导，但一致性和耐心会带来成果。笼内训练通常很成功，能为它们提供安全空间。如厕训练在有规律的时间表下通常很直接。高级训练如敏捷性或技巧训练对脑力刺激非常有益。总的来说，卡瓦普犬在温和、一致的引导下茁壮成长，并会成为有礼貌的伴侣。

diet.en: Feeding a Cavapoo a balanced, high-quality diet is essential for their health and longevity. Choose a dog food appropriate for their size, age, and activity level—puppy formulas for growth, adult maintenance for adults, and senior blends for older dogs. Look for foods with real meat as the first ingredient and avoid fillers like corn or soy. Cavapoos can be prone to obesity, so measure portions carefully and limit treats to 10% of daily calories. Feed two measured meals per day rather than free-feeding. Some Cavapoos may have food sensitivities, so monitor for signs like itching or digestive upset. Fresh water should always be available. Consider incorporating wet food or toppers for variety, but avoid table scraps. Supplements like omega-3 fatty acids can benefit their coat and joints, but consult your vet first. Puppies may need three to four meals daily until six months old. Always transition foods gradually over a week to avoid stomach issues.
diet.zh: 为卡瓦普犬提供均衡、高质量的饮食对其健康和寿命至关重要。选择适合其体型、年龄和活动水平的狗粮——幼犬配方用于成长，成年配方用于维持，老年配方用于年长犬只。寻找以真肉为首要成分的狗粮，避免玉米或大豆等填充物。卡瓦普犬易患肥胖症，因此需仔细计量份量，并将零食限制在每日热量的10%以内。每天分两餐定时喂食，而非自由采食。部分卡瓦普犬可能有食物敏感，需留意瘙痒或消化不适等迹象。始终提供新鲜饮用水。可考虑加入湿粮或浇头增加变化，但避免餐桌剩菜。补充剂如欧米伽-3脂肪酸可有益于被毛和关节，但需先咨询兽医。幼犬在六个月大前可能需要每天三到四餐。换粮时务必在一周内逐渐过渡，以避免肠胃问题。

livingTips.en: Cavapoos are highly adaptable and thrive in various living environments, from apartments to houses with yards. They are generally quiet dogs, making them excellent for apartment living, as long as they get daily exercise. A securely fenced yard is ideal for safe play, but not essential if walked regularly. They are very social and do best when not left alone for long periods—separation anxiety can be an issue. They are excellent with children, especially when raised together, though supervision with very young kids is advised due to their small size. Cavapoos generally get along well with other dogs and cats, especially if socialized early. They are indoor dogs that love being close to their family. Provide a comfortable bed, interactive toys, and a safe space. They are sensitive to extreme heat or cold, so avoid prolonged exposure. Overall, the Cavapoo is a versatile, loving companion that fits beautifully into family life, including with seniors or singles.
livingTips.zh: 卡瓦普犬适应性极强，能在从公寓到带院子的房屋等多种生活环境中茁壮成长。它们通常很安静，非常适合公寓生活，只要每天获得足够运动。有安全围栏的院子是理想的安全玩耍场所，但若定期散步则非必需。它们非常社交，不宜长时间独处——分离焦虑可能成为问题。卡瓦普犬与孩子相处融洽，尤其是一起长大的情况下，但因体型较小，与幼儿互动时建议监督。它们通常能与其他狗和猫友好相处，尤其是早期社会化后。它们是室内犬，喜欢与家人亲近。提供舒适的床、互动玩具和安全空间。它们对极端高温或寒冷敏感，因此避免长时间暴露。总的来说，卡瓦普犬是一种多才多艺、充满爱心的伴侣犬，非常适合家庭生活，包括老年人和单身人士。
